definitions: 牢记；把……记在心里；注意到（= remember and consider）

examples.text: This __28__ suggests that the layout and design of cities can hinder or promote healthier lifestyle choices and it is __29__ that urban planners bear this in mind.
examples.explanation: bear ... in mind 表示“把……记在心里；牢记；注意到”。句中 urban planners bear this in mind 指“城市规划者要把这一点牢记在心”，其中 this 指前面提到的城市布局和设计会阻碍或促进更健康的生活方式选择。
